reasoning: Starlink had secured a license to operate in Sri Lanka in August 2024. As of early 2025, significant progress was made: the Telecommunications Regulatory Commission of Sri Lanka (TRCSL) approved pricing and tariff plans in January 2025. On March 26 and 28, 2025, the TRCSL Director General and Cabinet spokespeople publicly announced that the service would officially launch in April 2025. While a brief mention of a hold due to national security concerns appeared on March 24, the subsequent announcements of an April launch heavily imply those hurdles were resolved. With 3 months between the projected April launch and the July 1, 2025 deadline, there is a very high probability that any minor delays will be overcome and the Starlink Availability Map will be updated to "Available" for Sri Lanka before the resolution date.
